title: Prove mutation crash atomicity and idempotency
preconditions: Temporary real SQLite generation with representative transactions, evidence, reconciliation, payment and pool attribution, corrections, relationships, idempotency outcomes, and an injectable activation adapter.
steps: Inject termination or failure before and after each SQL commit, evidence or decision link, artifact publication, manifest write, candidate verification, and CURRENT replacement; restart, inspect integrity and exact grouped totals, and replay the same request.
expected: Each restart sees exactly one complete committed effect or unchanged pre-operation state; no partial transaction, evidence, decision, attribution, assignment, relationship, scope, or artifact exists; replay returns the original stable outcome.
